hyperedges.label: Reparent-to-survivor before owner free (VFX + SFX share)
Shootable entities sharing the duck-typed on_hit() despawn contract
Four-layer quality stack (L0 static / L1 review / L2 smoke / L3 user-play)
Run vitals system: HealthComponent / WaveManager lives / RunState cross-swap carry
All concrete enemy FSM states implement EnemyState
All enemy archetypes extend Enemy base
Movement/attack-role behaviour components bound under Enemy.Abilities
HUD widgets wired to player/weapon seams
Fire-and-free VFX nodes that free themselves on finish
Gun signals → VfxRouter → VfxOneShot spawn flow
